embeds.title: Recommended GPU Drivers
embeds.description:
NVIDIA RTX 30/40 Series: [566.36](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/drivers/results/237719/)

All Other NVIDIA GPUs: [Latest](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/software/nvidia-app/)

AMD RX 400/500/VEGA series: [20.10.1](https://www.guru3d.com/download/amd-radeon-adrenalin-edition-20-10-1-driver-download/) (newer versions can have HEVC crashing issues)

AMD 5000/6000 series: [25.3.1](https://www.amd.com/en/resources/support-articles/release-notes/RN-RAD-WIN-25-3-1.html#Downloads)

AMD 7000/9000 series: [25.10.2](https://www.amd.com/en/resources/support-articles/release-notes/RN-RAD-WIN-25-10-2.html#Downloads)
